data.title: 国际服主线Vol.6 第三章 更新
data.summary: [Main Story Update Notice] Vol.6 Oratorio of Days Gone By Ch.3 「Ecclesia for Those Who Don't Disappe
data.body:
[Main Story Update Notice]

Vol.6 Oratorio of Days Gone By Ch.3 「Ecclesia for Those Who Don't Disappear」 has been revealed...

Subaru is becoming...something new.
What will become of the Arius Squad?
